entries.title: k3s
entries.description: Lightweight Kubernetes on 4 ThinkPad laptops. Control plane on set-hog, 3 workers. Upgraded to v1.36.1.

entries.title: ArgoCD
entries.description: App-of-apps GitOps engine. 56 Applications all Synced. Self-manages its own deployment.

entries.title: Helm
entries.description: All third-party charts deployed via ArgoCD multi-source Helm apps with values in minicloud-gitops.

entries.title: Kustomize
entries.description: Combo-1 base+overlays for own services. CI updates overlays/dev/ image tag; staging/prod require PRs.

entries.title: OpenTofu
entries.description: MAAS bare-metal IaC. Provisions 4 ThinkPad machines with PXE + cloud-init.

entries.title: Longhorn
entries.description: Distributed block storage for stateful workloads (Vault, Backstage DB, Langfuse). Ollama uses local-path instead.

entries.title: MetalLB
entries.description: L2 LoadBalancer providing 10.0.0.200 VIP for NGINX ingress.

entries.title: cert-manager
entries.description: 19 TLS certificates auto-issued from minicloud-ca ClusterIssuer. ACME deferred.

entries.title: Velero + Kopia
entries.description: Daily full cluster backups to MinIO S3. 7-day TTL. Restore tested.

entries.title: KEDA
entries.description: Event-driven autoscaling. Scale-to-zero on NATS JetStream queue depth. Cron schedules for dev/staging.

entries.title: Cloudflare Tunnel
entries.description: Zero-trust ingress for devandre.sbs public URLs. No open ports on residential IP.

entries.title: Ollama
entries.description: 3 instances (primary/secondary/tertiary). 9 models including qwen3.5:4b, phi4-mini, deepseek-r1:7b, bge-m3. 18 concurrent slots.

entries.title: LiteLLM AI Gateway
entries.description: Multi-provider routing: Groq, OpenAI, Gemini, DeepSeek, Mistral, Claude, HuggingFace, 3 Ollama instances. 16 dept keys, circuit breaker, cost dashboard.

entries.title: Open WebUI
entries.description: AI chat interface with RAG, web search, multi-model. OIDC via Authentik. phi3-financial for financial domain.

entries.title: pgvector
entries.description: 1024-dim HNSW vector index in ragdb. Custom noavx512 build required for i7 CPUs lacking AVX-512.

entries.title: Langfuse
entries.description: LLM observability: traces, scores, cost per dept key. v3.201.1 + ClickHouse + OIDC. Ragas scores posted per trace.

entries.title: RAG Pipeline
entries.description: bge-m3 (1024-dim) + hybrid BM25/HNSW + French stemmer + cross-encoder re-ranker. 911 insurance chunks. Ragas eval CI gate.

entries.title: SearXNG
entries.description: Self-hosted meta-search engine wired into Open WebUI globe icon for real-time web search.

entries.title: Ragas
entries.description: RAG evaluation framework. Faithfulness + hit_rate + MRR + answer_relevancy. GPT-4o judge. CI PostSync gate on ai app sync.

entries.title: Docling
entries.description: PDF layout analysis + OCR for RAG ingestion. 4.4 GB CPU image. Routes via markitdown-proxy.

entries.title: NVIDIA NIM
entries.description: 3 NVIDIA models in AI Gateway (nemotron-70b, llama-8b, deepseek-r1). API key in Vault. Assessing latency vs cost.

entries.title: HashiCorp Vault
entries.description: KV secrets for all platform credentials. Auto-unseal via AWS KMS. ESO pulls secrets into namespaces. PKI deferred.

entries.title: Authentik
entries.description: Identity provider for all platform apps. OIDC + TOTP MFA. 16 dept groups, 16 demo users. Forward-auth on Prometheus/Alertmanager.

entries.title: OPA/Gatekeeper
entries.description: 9/9 admission policies in deny mode, 0 violations. Blocks: latest tag, privileged, no limits, no TLS ingress, unapproved registry.

entries.title: External Secrets Operator
entries.description: 13 ExternalSecrets syncing Vault KV into k8s Secrets. ClusterSecretStore with Kubernetes auth.

entries.title: Cosign (keyless)
entries.description: All 7 custom images signed via GitHub OIDC → Sigstore Fulcio. SBOM attached as OCI referrer via Syft.

entries.title: Falco + Sidekick
entries.description: Runtime security. Sidekick routes events to Alertmanager. Covers: privileged pod, new cluster-admin, failed logins.

entries.title: NetworkPolicy (default-deny)
entries.description: Default-deny ingress on all 23 namespaces. Explicit allow rules per namespace. Flannel VTEP (10.42.0.0/24) webhook gotcha documented.

entries.title: Vaultwarden
entries.description: Self-hosted Bitwarden-compatible password manager. Timshel fork for SSO button. 15 platform credentials migrated.

entries.title: Go
entries.description: platform-demo service. Chi router, structured logging. 3-branch CI with cosign + SBOM.

entries.title: Python
entries.description: All custom AI services: rag-ingest, markitdown-proxy, rag-eval. FastAPI + uvicorn. Ragas + LangChain for eval.

entries.title: TypeScript
entries.description: Backstage (React + Node.js backend). Strict tsc. New frontend system with createApp.

entries.title: FastAPI
entries.description: Micro-framework for rag-ingest and markitdown-proxy. Auto-generates OpenAPI spec used in Backstage API docs.

entries.title: Astro
entries.description: Static site generator for ktayl-solution-web (insurance consulting portfolio). Tailwind CSS, 7 LOBs.

entries.title: Prometheus + Grafana
entries.description: kube-prometheus-stack. 40+ dashboards. Cert expiry alerts, Velero backup alerts, cost dashboard via LiteLLM PG queries.

entries.title: Loki + Promtail
entries.description: Cluster-wide log aggregation. Queryable in Grafana Explore.

entries.title: PostgreSQL
entries.description: AI stack: openwebui DB, ragdb (pgvector), LiteLLM DB. Platform: Backstage, Langfuse (ClickHouse for analytics).

entries.title: NATS JetStream
entries.description: Message broker for event-demo KEDA scale-to-zero. JetStream durable consumers.

entries.title: Cilium / Hubble
entries.description: Runbook authored. Execution deferred to fresh cluster rebuild — flannel replacement adds complexity during live ops.
